userId.description: User identifier (optional if API key maps to user)

failOpen.description: Allow tool calls when Intaris is unreachable (default: false)

allowPaths.description: Comma-separated parent directories for policy allow_paths (e.g., ~/src)

escalationTimeout.description: Max seconds to wait for escalation approval (0 = no timeout)

checkpointInterval.description: Evaluate calls between checkpoints (0 = disabled, default: 25)

failOpen.label: Fail Open
failOpen.help: If true, tool calls proceed when Intaris is unreachable

allowPaths.label: Allow Paths
allowPaths.help: Comma-separated parent directories to allow reads from

escalationTimeout.label: Escalation Timeout
escalationTimeout.help: Max seconds to wait for escalation approval (0 = no timeout)

recording.label: Session Recording
recording.help: Enable session recording for audit trail
